mano_cua.result_summary: 单选+过滤+optgroup场景：过滤功能完全失效，输入Jun后所有分组和选项仍然全部显示。多选模式过滤同样失效。两者行为一致但都是错误的。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Filter is completely non-functional in both Single Select and Multi Select modes. Typing 'Jun' does not hide any groups or non-matching options. All groups and all options remain visible.
